package rulecoverage

func PositiveScanIntoMapStringAnyHotPath() string {
    ruleID := "scan_into_map_string_any_hot_path"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Rows scanned into map[string]any instead of typed structs on hot paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
